description_long: This object consists of two Head & Shoulders Supreme shampoo containers: one is a tall, slightly curved bottle with a blue pump dispenser, and the other is a squeezable tube with a blue flip-top cap. Both containers feature a white base color adorned with vibrant, stylized leaf motifs in blue, green, and orange hues. The front of each container displays the Head & Shoulders logo, product name, and variant details, with the pump bottle labeled 'Supreme Color Protect' and the tube labeled 'Supreme Nourish & Smooth.' The back sides are densely covered with product information, ingredients, and usage instructions in small text. The pump bottle has a rounded, ergonomic silhouette, while the tube is more angular and tapers toward the cap. Both containers are made of smooth, glossy plastic and are designed to be easily handled and dispensed.
description: A pair of Head & Shoulders Supreme shampoo containers, one with a blue pump and one as a squeezable tube, both decorated with colorful leaf motifs and detailed product labeling.
description_view_0: Front view showing both the pump bottle and tube, with clear branding, colorful leaf graphics, and product names visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profiles of both containers, with the blue caps and a glimpse of the leaf motif wrapping around the sides.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back labels of both containers, filled with product information and ingredient lists.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the curvature of the pump bottle and the continuation of the leaf motif, with minimal label text visible.
attribute_brand_logo: Head & Shoulders logo with stylized swirl and text.
attribute_label_text: head & shoulders SUPREME COLOR PROTECT WITH ARGAN OIL & ANTI-OXIDANTS Free from parabens, colorants, and paraffins. SUPREME NOURISH & SMOOTH WITH ARGAN OIL & JOJOBA OIL Free from parabens, colorants, and paraffins.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: Tall, slightly curved bottle with rounded shoulders and a pump; tube is tapered with a flat base and rounded shoulders.
attribute_packaging_graphics: Colorful, stylized leaf motifs in blue, green, and orange wrapping around the containers.
